title: Choose your access before entering the app
starterDescription: For launching a first GEO project without complexity.
growthDescription: For a team managing multiple content tracks and competitors.
proDescription: For an organization that industrializes AI monitoring.
checkoutSuccessNotice: Payment confirmation is in progress. You will be redirected to the app as soon as Stripe confirms the subscription.
checkoutCancelNotice: Payment canceled. You can restart a plan whenever you are ready.
affiliateDescription: Recommend the platform to a marketing team or agency and track qualified introductions.
recurringCommissionDescription: Up to 20% on referred and activated accounts.
assistedIntroDescription: Share an opportunity and the team takes over for the demo.
afterPaymentDescription: Once Stripe confirms payment, accounts with a paid organization are redirected into the app.
